contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: White-label corporate gifting page — governor review and direction (2026-07-14/15). Reviewed the shipped white-label page state-by-state and directed the UI/UX audit. Caught the label-orientation defect by eye: spotted that white-label-mockup.png did not align with the actual product photo and identified that the label is 2in wide x 4in tall, not the 4in x 2in the page asserted in seven places. This was the highest-value finding of the session — the spec was rotated 90 degrees from the physical product, so every design collected would have been unusable, and no automated check would have caught it. Confirmed the 2x4 dimension on request, which unblocked D0 (spec flip), PR1 (registration + receipt repair), and the handoff. Also directed scope: commit the full implementation to git so a cloud agent could take over, and hand execution to the nelanco-claude box.
  
  Resulting merged PRs (executed by Claude Anthropic, logged separately): agroverse_shop_beta #182, #183, #184; agentic_ai_context #662, #663, #665, #667, #668.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
